heroSubtitle: Your smart companion for a seamless election experience.
myth1: My single vote won't make a difference.
fact1: Many elections are decided by narrow margins. Every single vote counts towards shaping the collective voice.
myth2: EVMs can be easily hacked via Wi-Fi.
fact2: EVMs are standalone machines with no wireless communication capabilities. They cannot be hacked remotely.
myth3: I cannot vote without a Voter ID card.
fact3: If your name is on the electoral roll, you can vote using alternate valid IDs like Aadhaar, Passport, or PAN card.
myth4: I can vote from anywhere online.
fact4: Voting requires physical presence at your designated polling booth to ensure security and anonymity.
featGuideDesc: Step-by-step instructions on registration and polling.
featMockDesc: Try our interactive mock voting machine simulator.
featAssistantDesc: Got questions? Ask our 24/7 smart assistant.
featBoothDesc: Locate your nearest polling station easily.
step1Desc: Ensure you are on the electoral roll. Register online or via form.
step2Desc: Bring a valid voter ID, Aadhaar, or accepted identification card.
step3Desc: Check your voter slip to find the designated polling booth location.
step4Desc: Press the button against your chosen candidate on the EVM and wait for the beep.
step5Desc: Results are declared on the official Election Commission website.
assistantSubtitle: Get instant answers to your voting questions.
assistantGreeting: Hello! I am your Smart Voter Assistant. How can I help you with your election queries today?
assistantError: I'm sorry, I encountered an error connecting to my servers. Please ensure the backend server is running and your API key is configured.
timelineEvent1Desc: Start registering for the upcoming term.
timelineEvent2Desc: Final day to get your name on the roll.
timelineEvent3Desc: Go out and cast your vote at designated booths.
timelineEvent5Desc: Final outcome is announced to the public.
mockSubtitle: Experience how the Electronic Voting Machine works securely.
voteCastDesc: Your mock vote has been securely recorded.
